title: Ga-Mawela Community Mining Charter
description: The foundational charter establishing the rights and responsibilities of community members in mining operations within the Ga-Mawela corridor.

title: SLP Annual Report 2023 - Anglo American
description: Social and Labor Plan annual compliance report detailing employment targets, community development initiatives, and procurement spending.

title: PAIA Request - Environmental Impact Assessment
description: Request for environmental impact assessment documentation related to the Two Rivers mining expansion project.

title: Mines Health and Safety Audit 2023
description: Independent audit of health and safety conditions across all mining operations in the Ga-Mawela corridor.

title: Community Development Fund Guidelines
description: Guidelines for the allocation and management of community development funds sourced from mining royalties.

title: Youth Employment Initiative Report
description: Comprehensive report on youth employment programs across mining companies in the region.

title: Water Usage Agreement - Two Rivers
description: Water usage agreement between Two Rivers Platinum and surrounding communities.

title: Land Restoration Progress Report
description: Quarterly report on land rehabilitation and restoration efforts in closed mining areas.
